Import TensorFlow and the necessary Keras layers from keras.layers
Define a batch size of 32 and image dimensions of 256x256
Create random uniform input data with shape (batch_size, height, width, 3)
Initialize an instance of StandardizedConv2DWithOverride with kernel_size=(3, 3) and activation='relu'
Call the call method of StandardizedConv2DWithOverride with the created input data
Verify that the output from the call method does not contain any NaN values
Monitor the GPU memory usage during execution of the convolution operation
Assert that the GPU memory usage is within a reasonable expected threshold for the given input size and batch size
